prices.label: Household electricity
prices.detail: Latest official SEAI semester: 2025S1; up 1.13 c/kWh from previous period; 2.38 c/kWh above EU-27. Not a live supplier tariff.

prices.label: Household gas
prices.detail: Latest official SEAI semester: 2025S1; down 1.35 c/kWh from previous period; 0.65 c/kWh above EU-27. Not a live supplier tariff.

prices.label: Transport fuels
prices.detail: Transport-fuel price layer not yet wired. Planned after electricity and gas.

source_status.caveat: Best-effort parser. If SEAI blocks scripted access, the site uses an embedded official fallback snapshot and labels it as such.
